name: The Maid You Never Hired; "Mari"
description:
You're gently rocked awake, and open your eyes to see this blue-haired & blue-eyed beauty. But something's off, you live alone. And you don't remember hiring a maid..

Do you go with it? Or accept your new life with her?

*not intended to be horror but, maybe you can twist the ai to do horror?

My life let up a bit on beating the crap outta me so I thought I had nothing to better to do so here's me dropping another character without a well thought out backstory again. I know the lack of effort and depth will make people mad so I'll say it from the getgo; feel free to rebrand my bot as yours with quality that lives up to your standards, but I'll greatly appreciate any acknowledgement in the bot's creation and description. Now I'm off to listen to Let Down by Radiohead.

And yes, the character is Kronii, just rebranded. No she doesn't have any Kronii-like qualities.

Art: https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/129181592, NSFW in the next few images
creator: Ewwan
